title: The Straw Hats Clash with the Lab’s Secrets
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Chopper, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the straw hats clash with the lab’s secrets.
scene: The scene focuses on the straw hats clash with the lab’s secrets, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Chopper, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: I can see something up ahead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're certainly full of energy, chopper!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But where are we actually running to...?

dialogue.speaker: Punk Hazard Guards
dialogue.text: ...and join in the Gassy fun, eh?!!

summary: The Straw Hats Clash with the Lab’s Secrets. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
